records.question: Which people born on 06.10.1976 with a weight of exactly 83.0 and height at most 188.0 have WNBC/Marist Poll candidate data showing a consider rate at most 0.3, unsure rate at most 0.2, support rate at least 0.25, and oppose rate at least 0.43?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE people.weight = 83.0 AND people.date_of_birth = '06.10.1976' AND candidate.consider_rate <= 0.3 AND candidate.poll_source = 'WNBC/Marist Poll' AND people.height <= 188.0 AND candidate.unsure_rate <= 0.2 AND candidate.support_rate >= 0.25 AND candidate.oppose_rate >= 0.43
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.People_ID
FROM people p
JOIN candidate c ON p.People_ID = c.People_ID
WHERE p.Date_of_Birth = '06.10.1976'
AND p.Weight = 83.0
AND p.Height <= 188.0
AND c.Poll_Source = 'WNBC/Marist Poll'
AND c.Consider_rate <= 0.3
AND c.Unsure_rate <= 0.2
AND c.Support_rate >= 0.25
AND c.Oppose_rate >= 0.43

records.question: Can you tell me about Laurent Capet who weighs 92.0, where the FOX News/Opinion Dynamics Poll shows a support rate of 0.18, oppose rate of at least 0.44, unsure rate of at most 0.3, and consider rate of at most 0.34?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE candidate.unsure_rate <= 0.3 AND candidate.poll_source = 'FOX News/Opinion Dynamics Poll' AND people.weight = 92.0 AND candidate.oppose_rate >= 0.44 AND people.name = 'Laurent Capet' AND candidate.support_rate = 0.18 AND candidate.consider_rate <= 0.34
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.People_ID
FROM people p
JOIN candidate c ON p.People_ID = c.People_ID
WHERE p.Name = 'Laurent Capet'
  AND p.Weight = 92.0
  AND c.Poll_Source = 'FOX News/Opinion Dynamics'
  AND c.Support_rate = 0.18
  AND c.Oppose_rate >= 0.44
  AND c.Unsure_rate <= 0.3
  AND c.Consider_rate <= 0.34

records.question: Which female candidates have an oppose rate of exactly 0.32, an unsure rate of at least 0.9, and a consider rate of at most 0.42?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE people.sex = 'F' AND candidate.oppose_rate = 0.32 AND candidate.unsure_rate >= 0.9 AND candidate.consider_rate <= 0.42
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.People_ID
FROM people p
JOIN candidate c ON p.People_ID = c.People_ID
WHERE p.Sex = 'F' 
AND c.Oppose_rate = 0.32 
AND c.Unsure_rate >= 0.9 
AND c.Consider_rate <= 0.42
